## Checklist

- [ ] My change has a clear motivation (linked above)
- [ ] I tested on a fresh machine, OR documented why I couldn't
- [ ] I didn't add new dependencies without flagging them in the PR description
- [ ] I didn't touch unrelated code
- [ ] No secrets, no personal info, no internal references
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By: Claude` or similar trailers
- [ ] If touching docs: no em dashes as clause separators
- [ ] If touching `install.sh` or `scripts/*.sh`: passes `shellcheck`
- [ ] If touching `scripts/*.js`: passes `node --check`
